titles.title: 神聖昂燐ダクリュオン・ルナ

data.title: Shinsei Kourin Dacryon Luna
data.title_japanese: 神聖昂燐ダクリュオン・ルナ
data.synopsis: Cute friends Runa, Raina and Miyu study at the prestigious private school Etoile and spend a lot of time together doing a variety of teenage activities. As members of a journalism club, the girls downloaded an app called Angel Maker, which proved challenging. It was cursed by fallen angels, and the girlfriends received magical powers. As they say, with new power comes new responsibility. Ugly monsters sensed the newfound magic, and from that moment began the tireless struggle of brave magical girls for goodness and justice.

data.title: Chao Neng Lifang: Chaofan Pian
data.synopsis:
Wang Xiaoxiu has been harboring feelings for his childhood friend, Shen Yao, for as long as he can remember. Now attending the same college, he is shocked to discover that Yao reciprocates his feelings. However, word spreads quickly about the two, and Xiaoxiu finds himself pursued by a delinquent group led by Sun Jun, who wants Yao for himself. While Xiaoxiu fights for his love, he ends up unconscious and falls into a river.

As Xiaoxiu wakes up, he is drawn to a strange light at the riverbed. When he makes contact with the object, it merges with his body, pulling him into another dimension. An unfamiliar voice introduces itself as the Horadric Cube and makes Xiaoxiu its new host. Fortunately for him, the cube comes with a pleasant surprise—he gains the power to teleport as well as improving his proficiency in fighting. Xiaoxiu must now collect various gemstones for the cube to absorb in order to gain even more strength to protect himself and the people he cares about from whatever dangers lie ahead.

[Written by MAL Rewrite]
data.background: Adaptation of Shuiluo Sheng Sheng's (水落声声) Chinese webtoon, Chao Neng Lifang (超能立方).

data.title: [Oshi no Ko] 3rd Season
data.synopsis:
Satisfied with his investigation of Lala Lai Theatrical Company, Aquamarine "Aqua" Hoshino shifts his focus from revenge to career growth and becomes a regular on the variety show Dig Deep! Chase the Impawsible. With memories of his mother still lingering in his mind, Aqua cuts contact with Kana Arima, leaving her unable to enjoy the surging popularity of her idol group, B-Komachi.

Meanwhile, following the bone-chilling discovery during B-Komachi's recent music video shoot, Aqua's sister, Ruby, resolves to solve the murders of those dearest to her. With the help of another soul still weighed down by Ai Hoshino's untimely demise, Ruby rises through the ranks, using any means necessary to get her way.

[Written by MAL Rewrite]

data.title: Xian Ji Xun Zong
data.synopsis:
The protagonist, Lin Chu, was born into a wealthy and prestigious family. However, his parents suddenly disappeared without a trace, the family company was seized by his father's former assistant, and even the villa he had lived in since childhood was taken over by so-called creditors. Forced to temporarily reside in the Lin family's old mansion in the suburbs, Lin Chu was surprised to find mysterious voices emanating from a bonsai tree in the courtyard. He unexpectedly entered the bonsai and discovered a sacred mountain and an immortal—Xuanqing Patriarch—sealed within. Xuanqing Patriarch realized Lin Chu possessed the ability to break the seal and decided to take him as a disciple, teaching him cultivation methods so he can break the seal. At the same time, to repay Lin Chu, Xuanqing Patriarch also agreed to teach him some skills to help him investigate the truth behind his parents' disappearance. Lin Chu agreed to Xuanqing Patriarch's request and thus embarked on the path of cultivation!

(Source: Youku, translated)

titles.title: Odayaka Kizoku no Kyuuka no Susume.
穏やか貴族の休暇のすすめ。

data.title: Odayaka Kizoku no Kyuuka no Susume.
data.title_japanese: 穏やか貴族の休暇のすすめ。
data.synopsis:
When Lizel mysteriously finds himself in a city that bears odd similarities to his own but clearly isn't, he quickly comes to terms with the unlikely truth: this is an entirely different world. Even so, laid-back Lizel isn't the type to panic. He immediately sets out to learn more about this strange place, and to help him do so, hires a seasoned adventurer named Gil as his tour guide and protector.

Until he's able to find a way home, Lizel figures this is a perfect opportunity to explore a new way of life adventuring as part of a guild. After all, he's sure he'll go home eventually... might as well enjoy the otherworldly vacation for now!

(Source: Tokyopop)
